title: How Should the Global South Respond?—H.E. Naledi Pandor with Helga Zepp-LaRouche & Jacques Cheminade
description:
Support the Schiller Institute https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/donate

H.E. Naledi Pandor (South Africa), former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, South Africa, addresses the Dec. 7-8 Schiller Institute conference, "In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!"

Watch the entirety of Panel 3
Panel 3: The Science Drivers of Physical Economy Today
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S9ltnjy5W4Q

Keynote: Jacques Cheminade (France), Former Presidential Candidate, President of Solidarité et Progrès
H.E. Naledi Pandor (South Africa), former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation, South Africa; “How Should the South Respond?”
Theodore Postol (U.S.), Professor Emeritus of Science, Technology and National Security at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology
Michele Geraci (Italy), Former Under Secretary of State, Ministry of Economic Development
Sergey Pulinets (Russia), Principal Research Scientist, Space Research Institute, Russian Academy of Sciences, Moscow
Jürgen Schöttle (Germany), Master in Engineering, Power Plant Construction
Brian Harvey (Ireland), Space Historian
